description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a mix of brick and white exterior walls. The structure features large windows, a spacious driveway leading to a garage, and a fenced backyard with a garden area. Several mature trees are positioned around the property, providing shade and enhancing the residential feel. The house includes multiple entry points, with the main entrance accessible from the driveway and a secondary entrance leading to the backyard. The layout is open, with visible interior spaces such as living areas and a kitchen, and the outdoor spaces are well-integrated with the house. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor areas, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, brick and white walls, large windows, a garage, and a fenced backyard with a garden and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and two large trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, side windows, and the arrangement of trees along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, garden area, and secondary entrance, with the garage visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, garden, and additional trees, with a clear look at the flat roof and open layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door accessible from the driveway, with no porch or columns, and a clean, minimalist design.
